item.title: Android App Links Open in a Browser Instead of the App
item.description: When verified URLs open in a browser instead of the app, inspect supported-link settings, domain verification, defaults, and competing apps.

item.title: Android Battery Optimization Stops an App
item.description: When tracking, VPN, health, or sync apps stop, understand battery-optimization exclusions and what to verify before allowing unrestricted background use.

item.title: How to Check Android Device Administrators and Management Profiles
item.description: When settings or app removal are blocked, distinguish device administrators, work profiles, VPN or certificates, and parental controls.

item.title: How to Factory Reset an Android Phone Safely
item.description: Prepare account access and backups before erasing an Android phone through Settings.

item.title: How to Force Restart an Android Phone
item.description: Force restart a frozen Android phone and account for manufacturer-specific button combinations safely.

item.title: Android Notification Category or Channel Is Missing
item.description: Find missing Android notification categories for messages, calls, sync, and conversations by checking channel creation, app version, and conversation controls.

item.title: Android Notification History: Enable, Read, and Troubleshoot It
item.description: Use Android Notification History and understand activation requirements, retention limits, excluded notifications, and manufacturer differences.

item.title: Google Play Protect Blocks or Disables an App
item.description: When Play Protect blocks or disables an app, verify its source, signature, update state, and management policy without casually disabling protection.

item.title: Android Private DNS Not Working: Advanced Troubleshooting
item.description: Diagnose Private DNS hostnames that will not save, break connectivity, or fail only on certain Wi-Fi networks by separating provider, VPN, certificate, and network restrictions.

item.title: Use Android Safe Mode to Identify a Problem App
item.description: Test whether restarts, freezing, battery drain, pop-ups, or other issues are caused by a downloaded app, then remove candidates one at a time.

item.title: Android Phone Stuck in a Boot Loop or on the Logo: Recovery Guide
item.description: Troubleshoot repeated reboots and logo freezes through charging, button checks, one forced restart, Safe mode, and model-specific official recovery.

item.title: Android System WebView Causes Apps to Crash
item.description: When multiple apps crash or embedded web pages turn blank, inspect Android System WebView, Chrome updates, beta builds, and cached components.

item.title: Android Date or Time Errors Cause Certificate Warnings
item.description: Fix certificate-expiry warnings caused by incorrect Android date or time by checking automatic time, time zone, SIM source, clock retention, and root certificates.

item.title: Transfer Data from Android to a New Android Phone
item.description: Use Google backup, cable transfer, wireless copy, and manufacturer tools while separately preparing authenticator, eSIM, banking, and messaging data.

item.title: Transfer from Android to iPhone with Move to iOS
item.description: Use Apple’s official Move to iOS process for contacts, messages, photos, and supported apps, then handle eSIM, authentication, and messaging services separately.

item.title: Android USB OTG Storage Is Not Mounting
item.description: When Android does not mount a USB drive or card reader, check OTG support, power, file system, USB mode, and encryption.

item.title: Android Work Profile Is Paused or Not Syncing
item.description: Fix grayed-out work apps or stopped notifications by checking the Work Profile toggle, schedules, management policy, and device-policy controller connectivity.

item.title: Transfer an Authenticator App Before Resetting a Phone
item.description: Avoid losing two-factor codes by checking cloud sync, export options, backup codes, and per-service re-enrollment before resetting a phone.

item.title: How to Find Text on a Web Page in Chrome and Safari
item.description: Use Find in Page in Chrome and Safari to locate a word or phrase within a long page.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Maintenance Mode: Setup and Repair Checklist
item.description: Use Samsung Galaxy Maintenance Mode before repair, including eligibility, backup, system-log options, technician access, and exit steps.

item.title: Galaxy Secure Folder Notifications Are Missing or Hidden
item.description: Fix missing or hidden Secure Folder notifications by checking folder lock state, content visibility, power controls, and differences from a work profile.

item.title: How to Search with Google Lens on a Smartphone
item.description: Use Google Lens with a camera or saved photo to identify objects, places and text while reducing false matches.

item.title: How to Search Google Effectively on a Smartphone
item.description: Build better search queries, recognize official sources, and narrow results by date, place and purpose.

item.title: iPhone Says This Accessory May Not Be Supported
item.description: Resolve iPhone accessory-not-supported warnings by checking certification, debris, power requirements, liquid detection, and iOS compatibility.

item.title: AirDrop Is Stuck on Waiting
item.description: Fix AirDrop stuck on waiting or unable to find the recipient by checking receiving mode, contact matching, Wi-Fi and Bluetooth, and Personal Hotspot.

item.title: iPhone App Shows a Cloud Icon and Will Not Open
item.description: Understand offloaded apps with cloud icons, automatic offloading, App Store availability, and which local documents remain.

item.title: iPhone Background App Refresh Is Not Working
item.description: Fix Background App Refresh that is disabled or ineffective by checking Low Power Mode, cellular access, Screen Time, and force-closing habits.

item.title: How to Factory Reset an iPhone Safely
item.description: Erase all content and settings on an iPhone safely after checking backup, eSIM and account access.

item.title: iPhone Focus Mode Is Blocking Important Notifications
item.description: Fix important alerts blocked by iPhone Focus by checking shared Focus state, schedules, filters, allowed people and apps, and emergency exceptions.

item.title: How to Force Restart an iPhone by Model
item.description: Force restart an unresponsive iPhone using the correct button sequence for Face ID, iPhone 7 and older models.

item.title: iPhone iCloud Backup Is Stuck or Calculating Time
item.description: Fix an iCloud backup stuck on calculating or not progressing by checking storage, Wi-Fi quality, power mode, included apps, and encryption.

item.title: iCloud Private Relay Causes Website or Wi-Fi Problems
item.description: When Private Relay breaks a site, changes location, or triggers a network warning, check IP tracking controls, network compatibility, and VPN overlap.

item.title: How to Use iPhone Recovery Mode: Update vs Restore Explained
item.description: Prepare a computer, enter Recovery mode, and understand the data-preserving Update option versus the data-erasing Restore option.

item.title: Why iPhone Stolen Device Protection Adds a Security Delay
item.description: Understand the security delay for Apple Account or passcode changes, including familiar locations, biometric checks, and protected actions.

item.title: iPhone Stuck on the Apple Logo: Data-Safe Recovery Order
item.description: Work through waiting, one forced restart, and Recovery mode when an iPhone remains on the Apple logo or progress bar, prioritizing Update before an erase.

item.title: iPhone System Data Storage Is Very Large
item.description: Investigate iPhone System Data growth by separating caches, logs, streaming data, update files, and incomplete sync operations.

item.title: Transfer from iPhone to Android: Photos, Contacts, Messages, and More
item.description: Use the official Android switch process while preparing iMessage, FaceTime, eSIM, authenticators, WhatsApp, and data that may not transfer automatically.

item.title: Transfer Data from an Old iPhone to a New iPhone with Quick Start
item.description: Compare Quick Start, iCloud, and encrypted computer backups and verify eSIM, authentication, messaging, Wallet, and important data before erasing the old iPhone.

item.title: iPhone Unavailable or Security Lockout: What to Do
item.description: Handle iPhone Unavailable or Security Lockout safely by understanding wait times, previous passcode options, device erase, and Apple Account requirements.

item.title: Lost Phone: Find, Lock and Erase It Remotely
item.description: Locate, lock and if necessary erase a lost iPhone or Android phone while protecting accounts and carrier service.

item.title: How to Recognize Phishing Text Messages and Fake Sites
item.description: Recognize delivery, unpaid-bill and account-suspension scams, and respond safely after opening a suspicious link.

item.title: Pixel Adaptive Connectivity and Unexpected 5G or Wi-Fi Switching
item.description: Understand how Pixel Adaptive Connectivity affects 5G use, battery consumption, and network switching, and how to run a controlled disabled test.

item.title: How to Use Pixel Device Diagnostics and Battery Checks
item.description: Use Pixel settings and official support diagnostics to check battery, connectivity, and sensors and collect useful information before repair.

item.title: Pixel Repair Mode: Preparation and Limitations
item.description: Prepare for Pixel Repair Mode by understanding eligibility, backups, screen-lock requirements, what technicians can access, and how to exit.

item.title: Why 5G Is Not Showing on a 5G Phone
item.description: Diagnose a 5G-capable phone that stays on LTE by checking bands, NSA versus SA, power settings, SIM provisioning, and local coverage.

item.title: Phone Alarm Did Not Ring or Was Too Quiet: What to Check
item.description: Verify time, repeat days, alarm sound, volume, Bluetooth output, clock-app restrictions, and a real test before relying on an alarm.

item.title: Android Auto Keeps Disconnecting or Will Not Start
item.description: Fix Android Auto that disconnects or will not launch by checking USB quality, wireless requirements, permissions, battery controls, and head-unit compatibility.

item.title: Phone APN Settings Not Saving or Working
item.description: Fix APN profiles that do not save or provide data even when 4G or 5G appears by checking APN type, authentication, MCC/MNC, and carrier provisioning.

item.title: App Keeps Crashing or Will Not Open on a Phone
item.description: Fix an app that will not open or keeps closing by checking updates, permissions, storage and reinstall options.

item.title: How to Review Phone App Permissions and Choose Safely
item.description: Limit camera, microphone, location, photos, contacts, Bluetooth, and notification access to what each app genuinely needs.
